# Company Information
name: NorthPeak Technologies
description: Expert MVP development services for non-technical founders. Transform startup ideas into market-ready products in 4 weeks.
website: https://northpeaktechnologies.com
founded: 2023
headquarters: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

# Core Services
- MVP Development Services
- Web Application Development
- Mobile App Development (React Native, Flutter)
- AI Solutions & Automations
- Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
- Quality Assurance & Testing
- CMS Integration (Sanity, Contentful)
- Landing Page Development
- Project Rescue & Refactoring

# Technology Stack
frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Native, Flutter
backend: Node.js, Python, Express, FastAPI
cloud: AWS, Google Cloud, Vercel, Netlify
database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Firebase
ai: OpenAI GPT, Custom LLMs, LangChain, Vector Databases
testing: Jest, Cypress, Playwright, Selenium
devops: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, GitHub Actions

# Industries Served
- SaaS Startups
- E-commerce
- Fintech
- Healthcare Technology
- EdTech
- Marketplace Platforms
- Productivity Tools
- AI/ML Applications

# Target Audience
- Non-technical founders
- Startup entrepreneurs
- Small business owners
- Product managers
- Companies needing rapid MVP development
- Teams requiring AI automation solutions

# Value Proposition
- 4-week MVP development timeline
- Fixed pricing model (USD 5,000 - 20,000)
- No hiring required
- End-to-end development
- Transparent process
- Modern tech stack
- Production-ready code
- 24/7 support available

# Development Process
1. Strategy & Wireframes (Week 1)
2. Design & Prototype (Week 2)
3. MVP Development (Week 3)
4. Testing & Launch (Week 4)

# Pricing Structure
starting_price: $5,000 USD
price_range: $5,000 - $20,000 USD
timeline: 4 weeks standard
payment_terms: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery

# Key Differentiators
- Specialization in non-technical founders
- Rapid 4-week delivery
- No hiring required
- Modern technology stack
- AI-powered solutions

crawl_frequency: Weekly
priority_pages: homepage, services, blog, contact

user_agent: *

# AI-Specific Guidelines
content_accuracy: All information is current and verified as of last update date
update_frequency: Blog updated weekly, services monthly
expertise_level: 5+ years in software engineering, AI systems, and cloud technologies
team_size: 10+ developers
clients_served: 50+ startups

# FAQ Highlights
Q: How long does it take to build an MVP?
A: Our standard timeline is 4 weeks for a core functional product.

Q: Do I need technical skills to work with you?
A: No, we specialize in helping non-technical founders build products.

Q: What's the pricing?
A: Starting at $5,000 USD, ranging from $5,000-$20,000 based on complexity.

Q: What technologies do you use?
A: Modern stack: Next.js, React, Node.js, AWS, PostgreSQL, and AI/ML tools.

Q: Do you provide ongoing support?
A: Yes, we offer maintenance and support packages after launch.
